category_sources: source_facts.description identifies libpostal-rest as a REST API for libpostal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as libpostal-rest.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project; its README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/johnlonganecker/libpostal-rest, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a REST API for libpostal; source_facts.executables lists libpostal-rest.
